name: Jade Biosciences, Inc.
business: Jade Biosciences, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company developing novel biologic therapies for patients with autoimmune diseases. Its lead product candidate is JADE101, a monoclonal antibody targeting APRIL for IgA nephropathy. The company does not have any approved products and has not generated any product revenue.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company developing novel biologic therapies for patients living with autoimmune diseases.
The Board of Directors, as a whole and at the committee level, considers cybersecurity risk as part of its risk oversight function.

catalysts.sentence: We initiated a Phase 1 clinical trial of JADE101 in healthy volunteers in New Zealand in August 2025, with the aim of generating interim data, including mechanistic biomarker data, in the second quarter of 2026.
We plan to initiate an open-label Phase 2 clinical trial in IgAN patients in the middle of 2026, with interim data expected in 2027.
We plan to initiate a Phase 1 clinical trial evaluating JADE201 in patients with rheumatoid arthritis in the second quarter of 2026, with interim data expected in 2027.
We expect to initiate a Phase 1 clinical trial for JADE301 in the first half of 2027.
